programme.desc: When Bhutan's king abdicates in favour of democratic reform, a strange series of events unfolds. 2023. Bhutan. Director: Pawo Choyning Dorji. Starring: Tandin Wangchuk.

programme.desc: The inside story of a waiter turned movie mogul and the scandal that rocked Hollywood. 2024. UK. Director: John Dower.

programme.desc: Amy Powner, an industry outsider, creates a collection that is ethical, and sustainable. 2022. UK. Director. Becky Hutner.

programme.title: The End
programme.desc: Years after environmental collapse, a family's idyllic bunker-life crumbles when a stranger arrives. 2024. Germany, Denmark. Director: Joshua Oppenheimer. Starring: Tilda Swinton, George MacKay.

programme.title: Totally F***ed Up
programme.desc: A group of alienated queer teenagers struggle to get along and complain about their lives together. 1993. United States. Director: Gregg Araki. Starring: James Duval, Roko Belic.

programme.desc: A group of LA teens trying to make sense of there multisectional lives attend the wildest party of the year. 1997. France, United States. Director: Gregg Araki. Starring: James Duval, Rachel True.

programme.desc: A family's holiday is interrupted when two polite young men use golf clubs to take them hostage. 1997. Austria. Director: Michael Haneke. Starring: Naomi Watts, Tim Roth.

programme.desc: 1/1. A real estate agent turns to a life of crime when her husband leaves her with a huge debt. 2025. Finland. Director: Tiina Lymi. Starring: Laura Malmivaara, Katja Kuttner.

programme.title: Memento
